home.tagline: We'd love to celebrate our special day with you

story.title: Our Story
story.p1: We met seven years ago, when life brought us together at just the right moment. We haven't stopped laughing, traveling and dreaming together since.
story.p2: After all the adventures, we decided to take the big step — and we want you there with us when we say “I do”.

location.title: Getting There
location.parking: Free parking is available at the venue, with a public lot a short walk away.
location.access: The venue is wheelchair and stroller accessible, with step-free entry and accessible parking.

gift.title: Gift
gift.intro: Your presence is the greatest gift. For anyone who'd like to spoil us, here are a few options:

rsvp.title: Let us know you're coming
rsvp.text: To confirm your attendance, use the personal link from your invitation.
rsvp.noToken: Didn't get a personal link yet? Reach out and we'll be glad to help.

rsvpPage.invalidBody: We couldn't find this link. Check that you copied the full address, or reach out and we'll help.
rsvpPage.errorBody: We couldn't load your invitation. Please try again in a moment.
rsvpPage.intro: We'd love to know if you can celebrate with us
rsvpPage.alreadyResponded: You've already responded — you can update your answer any time.
rsvpPage.partyTooLarge: That's more guests than this invitation covers. Check the numbers or reach out to us.
rsvpPage.submitError: Couldn't send. Please try again in a moment.
rsvpPage.confirmTitleYes: Thank you! See you at the wedding 🎉
rsvpPage.confirmBodyYes: You're on the list. We can't wait to see you!
rsvpPage.confirmBodyNo: Sorry you can't make it — we'll be thinking of you on the big day.
